comments.body:
No actionable comments were generated in the recent review. 🎉
ℹ️ Recent review info
⚙️ Run configuration **Configuration used**: defaults **Review profile**: CHILL **Plan**: Pro Plus **Run ID**: `53be391a-62e3-4e24-ae3a-1f358fda561c`
📥 Commits Reviewing files that changed from the base of the PR and between 2d6947b4bf2e0e61ff5ed68547512293947b203a and 4dc73aa5f712277acc73ec078b70d2023b07ae95.
📒 Files selected for processing (2) * `src/agentic_portfolio/web/static/style.css` * `src/agentic_portfolio/web/templates/dashboard.html`
---
📝 Walkthrough ## Walkthrough A CSS grid layout class is added to enable three-column panel displays with responsive mobile collapse to single column. Dashboard HTML is restructured to apply this grid to consolidate RUN PROGRESS, WATCHLIST, and SYSTEM panels into a unified responsive layout. ## Changes **Dashboard Panel Grid Reorganization** |Layer / File(s)|Summary| |---|---| |**CSS Grid Styling**
`src/agentic_portfolio/web/static/style.css`|Introduces `.panel-grid-3` class defining three-column grid layout with gap and padding, plus mobile breakpoint rule to collapse grid to single column (1fr).| |**Template Restructuring**
`src/agentic_portfolio/web/templates/dashboard.html`|RUN PROGRESS, WATCHLIST, and SYSTEM panels are reorganized into a single container using the new `panel-grid-3` class, replacing their previous separate layout blocks.| ## Estimated code review effort 🎯 1 (Trivial) | ⏱️ ~8 minutes ## Possibly related PRs - [cjunks94/agentic-portfolio#27](https://github.com/cjunks94/agentic-portfolio/pull/27): Also rearranges dashboard panels (RUN PROGRESS, WATCHLIST) in the same template file; this PR adds the CSS grid infrastructure to support that reorganization. ## Poem > 🐰 Three columns wide, on desktop they shine, > Mobile breaks it down, one stack at a time, > Panels now flow in grids, responsive and neat, > Dashboard redesigned—hopping to the beat! ✨
🚥 Pre-merge checks | ✅ 5
✅ Passed checks (5 passed) | Check name | Status | Explanation | | :------------------------: | :------- | :----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Title check | ✅ Passed | The title clearly and specifically summarizes the main change: reorganizing three dashboard panels (Run Progress, Watchlist, System) into a 3-column grid layout. | | Description check | ✅ Passed | The description comprehensively follows the template with all required sections completed: summary, type, changes, testing, and checklist. It provides detailed rationale, implementation specifics, and test coverage confirmation. | | Docstring Coverage | ✅ Passed | No functions found in the changed files to evaluate docstring coverage. Skipping docstring coverage check. | | Linked Issues check | ✅ Passed | Check skipped because no linked issues were found for this pull request. | | Out of Scope Changes check | ✅ Passed | Check skipped because no linked issues were found for this pull request. |
✏️ Tip: You can configure your own custom pre-merge checks in the settings.
✨ Finishing Touches
